name: market-pipe
description: CLI-first market data ingestion for Postgres.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp src/features/coingecko/config.yaml dist/features/coingecko/config.yaml && cp src/features/alphavantage/config.yaml dist/features/alphavantage/config.yaml && cp src/features/custom_csv/config.yaml dist/features/custom_csv/config.yaml
